rationale: Both correctly diagnose the base-tokenizer/None+int crash, cite the same hunyuan_image3.py:1561-1563 lines, and give the identical FayeSpica-confirmed DiT workaround plus a guard/docs fix matching akshatvishu's proposal. Y goes further with deeper code grounding (extra surrounding lines, yaml header text, a concrete tolerant-init diff) and lands closer to the thread's actual disposition (treat as resolved via workaround, track hardening in a new issue) versus X's vaguer 'keep-open' framing. X's edge is explicitly citing PR #2713, which Y omits entirely.
